code: import api from'./api';export const authService={async register(username,email,password){const response=await api.post('/auth/register',{username,email,password});return response.data;},async login(email,password){const response=await api.post('/auth/login',{email,password});return response.data;},async getMe(){const response=await api.get('/auth/me');return response.data;},logout(){localStorage.removeItem('token');localStorage.removeItem('user');}};
